phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q the wave edge and his toes — the energy crunch is real, so every kama needs to farm AND poke at once.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: More Q pressure — hold the energy bar above 100 so a real trade window never finds you broke.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Slight edge at level 3: your shroud-energy burst windows beat Anivia's wall-frost poke control on the margins. Take the short trades you start — just don't force a coin-flip all-in off a small lead.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Passive-weave every trade: spell, walk out of the ring, auto the edge — the energy refunds pay the whole lane.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Your shroud-energy burst windows out-muscle Anivia's wall-frost poke control at the level-6 breakpoint — this window is yours, so force the trades and tax every step toward the wave.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: On first item the numbers lean your way — shroud-energy burst windows edge out the wall-frost poke control when both sides play it straight. Press the small advantages: wave position, first poke, cooldown ticks.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Akali erases carries: R in through the front line, shroud the response, E-reset out with the kill.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: At level 1 your shroud-energy burst windows beat the stardust ramp control in a straight exchange. Play the front foot — make Aurelion Sol answer you, not the other way around.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: More Q pressure — hold the energy bar above 100 so a real trade window never finds you broke.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Shroud online: the trade pattern is Q-auto, shroud the answer, Q again from the smoke. Most mids lose this exchange.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Your shroud-energy burst windows out-muscle Aurelion Sol's stardust ramp control through levels 4-5 — this window is yours, so force the trades and tax every step toward the wave.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Perfect Execution online — the double-dash R turns half-health mages into clean-up duty. Look for the all-in.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: At level 3 the numbers lean his way — the double-blade spirit dives out-tick your shroud-energy burst windows in even exchanges. Don't bleed for pride; take the trades his cooldowns hand you.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Slight deficit through levels 4-5: Yone's double-blade spirit dives edge out your shroud-energy burst windows on the margins. You can still trade — just let him start the exchanges and answer on your terms.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Perfect Execution online — the double-dash R turns half-health mages into clean-up duty. Look for the all-in.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Slight deficit on first item: Yone's double-blade spirit dives edge out your shroud-energy burst windows on the margins. You can still trade — just let him start the exchanges and answer on your terms.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Akali erases carries: R in through the front line, shroud the response, E-reset out with the kill.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q the wave edge and his toes — the energy crunch is real, so every kama needs to farm AND poke at once.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: More Q pressure — hold the energy bar above 100 so a real trade window never finds you broke.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Shroud online: the trade pattern is Q-auto, shroud the answer, Q again from the smoke. Most mids lose this exchange.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Passive-weave every trade: spell, walk out of the ring, auto the edge — the energy refunds pay the whole lane.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Perfect Execution online — the double-dash R turns half-health mages into clean-up duty. Look for the all-in.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: First item spike: shroud trades become kill threats. Force the wave contact and punish every spell he whiffs.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Akali erases carries: R in through the front line, shroud the response, E-reset out with the kill.
